Package de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.metaconstruct.arith

Class Monomial

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.metaconstruct.arith.Monomial
public class Monomial extends Object
Class for analysing and modifying monomial expressions over the integers

    • ONE

  • Method Details

    • create

      public static Monomial create(Term monoTerm, Services services)

    • setCoefficient

      public Monomial setCoefficient(BigInteger c)

    • multiply

      public Monomial multiply(BigInteger c)

    • multiply

      public Monomial multiply(Monomial m)

    • addToCoefficient

      public Monomial addToCoefficient(BigInteger c)

    • divides

      public boolean divides(Monomial m)
      Returns:
      true iff the monomial this divides the monomial m

    • variablesSubsume

      public boolean variablesSubsume(Monomial m)
      Returns:
      true iff the variables/parts of this subsume the variables of m, i.e., if each variable that occurs in m occurs in the same or a higher power in this

    • variablesEqual

      public boolean variablesEqual(Monomial m)

    • variablesDisjoint

      public boolean variablesDisjoint(Monomial m)

    • reducible

      public boolean reducible(Monomial m)
      Returns:
      true iff the coefficient of m can be made smaller (absolutely) by subtracting a multiple of this

    • reduce

      public Monomial reduce(Monomial m)
      Returns:
      the result of dividing the monomial m by the monomial this

    • divideLCR

      public Monomial divideLCR(Monomial m)
      Returns:
      the result of dividing the least common reducible (LCR) of monomial m and this by the monomial this

    • toTerm

      public Term toTerm(Services services)

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Overrides:
